zh.Kilmarnock, Ayr, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可
zh.Coventry, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾考文垂
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle Russell於1267年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾培斯時，她的父親John Russell47歲，母親Isabella Countess of Menteith50歲。她於1292年11月18日與Edmund Hastings在英國蘇格蘭培爾培斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1305年10月3日在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾享年38歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾考文垂。

zh-hans.Kilmarnock, Ayr, Scotland: 英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可
zh-hans.Coventry, Warwickshire, England: 英国瓦維其可爾考文垂
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle Russell于1267年出生在英国苏格兰培爾培斯时，她的父亲John Russell47岁，母亲Isabella Countess of Menteith50岁。她于1292年11月18日与Edmund Hastings在英国苏格兰培爾培斯结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1305年10月3日在英国苏格兰斯林史爾享年38岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾考文垂。

nameMeanings.name: Russell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: of Norman origin, from Old French and Anglo-Norman French r(o)ussel, a diminutive of Old French rous(e) ‘red, reddish’, used either as a nickname for someone with red hair or a ruddy complexion, or as a personal name. Compare Rouse . This Norman name has been established in Ireland since the 12th century. It has been reinforced in Britain and Ireland by Huguenot bearers of the name Roussel, of the same Old French origin.

English: habitational name from any of several places called Rushall (Norfolk, Staffordshire, Wiltshire) or possibly sometimes from Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent). Rushall in Staffordshire derives from Old English rysc ‘rush, rushes’ + halh ‘nook, corner of land’. Rushall in Norfolk derives from an uncertain first element + Old English halh. Rushall in Wiltshire derives from an Old English personal name Rust (genitive Rustes) + halh. Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent) probably derives from Old English rust ‘rust, rust color’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’, but with a change in the final element due to influence from Middle English, Old English hall ‘hall, residence’, perhaps referring to a nearby building.
Americanized form of German Rüssel, from a pet form of any of various personal names formed with the element hrōd ‘fame, renown’.

variants.name: Russler
meanings: occupational name for a farmer, from an agent derivative of rüsseln ‘to shallow plow’.

variants.name: Rouse
meanings: English: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French rous(e) ‘red(-haired)’ (from Latin russ(e)us).
Walloon and northern French (Rousé): variant of Rosé (see Rose ).

variants.name: Russel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Russell  .
German: from a pet form of Russ, see Russ 2.
northwest German (Rüssel): probably a variant of Rossel .

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle Russell was born in 1267, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Russell, was 47 and her mother, Isabella Countess of Menteith, was 50. She married Edmund Hastings on 18 November 1292, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 3 October 1305, in Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in Coventry, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle Russell est née en 1267, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Russell, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Isabella Countess of Menteith, avait 50 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Hastings le 18 novembre 1292, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 3 octobre 1305, à Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Coventry, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle Russell 1267 in Perth, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Russell 47 und ihre Mutter Isabella Countess of Menteith 50. Sie hat am 18. November 1292 in Perth, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Edmund Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 3. Oktober 1305 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Coventry, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle Russell è nata il nel 1267 nel Perth, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Russell, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Isabella Countess of Menteith, aveva 50 anni. Lei sposato Edmund Hastings il 18 novembre 1292, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 3 ottobre 1305, nel Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Coventry, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle Russellが1267年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで生まれた時，父John Russellは47歳，母Isabella Countess of Menteithは50歳であった。1292年11月18日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスでEdmund Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1305年10月3日にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアで38歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアコベントリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle Russell(이)가 1267년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Russell(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Countess of Menteith(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 1292년 11월 18일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 Edmund Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1305년 10월 3일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 커븐트리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle Russell nasceu em 1267, em Perth, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Russell, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Countess of Menteith, tinha 50 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Hastings em 18 de novembro de 1292, em Perth, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 3 de outubro de 1305, em Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle Russell родилась в 1267 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Russell было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Countess of Menteith, 50. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Hastings 18 ноября 1292 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 3 октября 1305 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности ковентри, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle Russell nació en 1267, en Perth, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Russell, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Isabella Countess of Menteith, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Edmund Hastings el 18 de noviembre de 1292, en Perth, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 3 de octubre de 1305, en Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
